headlines.headline: Brevep Systems reports 15% increase in customer acquisition

sentiment.reasoning: A product recall due to quality concerns creates immediate operational costs and potential reputational damage that will likely persist.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
